1.solution:
Speed=99km/75min=132000cm/min. Front circumference=2ПҖГ—21=42ПҖ, Rear=2ПҖГ—28=56ПҖ.
Front rev/min=132000/(42ПҖ), Rear rev/min=132000/(56ПҖ).
Difference=132000/ПҖГ—(1/42вҲ’1/56)=132000/ПҖГ—1/168=132000Г—7/(168Г—22)=250.
Answer: 250.

2.solution:
After two runners cross, remaining times: Sita=4min, Gita=9min.
Formula: v_Sita/v_Gita=вҲҡ(t_Gita/t_Sita)=вҲҡ(9/4)=3/2.
Ratio Sita:Gita=3:2.
Answer: B (3:2).

3.solution:
Car-1 time=D/(2s). Car-2 time=2D/s.
Difference=2D/sвҲ’D/(2s)=3D/(2s)=45min=3/4h.
D/s=1/2h вҶ’ Car-2 time=2Г—(1/2)=1 hour.
Answer: A (1).

4.solution:
Speeds 3 & 7 m/s on 500m track, start opposite ends. Combined=10m/s.
1st meeting at t=50s: Slow at x=150m.
After: F(7) reaches x=0 at t=500/7s, bounces right. F catches S: 7tвҲ’500=3t вҶ’ t=125s, x=375m (2nd meeting).
F bounces at x=500 at t=1000/7s. Both moving toward each other: meet at x=500вҲ’7Г—(50/7)=450m, t=150s.
Slow runner (S) at x=450m from start.
Answer: B (450).

5.solution:
New scenario: motorcyclist speed doubled вҶ’ journey=1.5h (7:00вҖ“8:30AM). Car interval=20min.
A car crosses motorcyclist iff it departs before motorcyclist arrives (8:30AM).
Cars departing from 7:01AM every 20min before 8:30AM: 7:01, 7:21, 7:41, 8:01, 8:21 вҶ’ 5 cars.
Answer: 5.

6.solution:
Let v=walk speed, e=escalator speed, N=steps.
Normal: N=(v+e)Г—30. Double: N=(2v+e)Г—18.
30v+30e=36v+18e вҶ’ 12e=6v вҶ’ e=v/2.
N=(v+v/2)Г—30=45v. Standing still: time=N/e=45v/(v/2)=90s.
Answer: A (90).

8.solution:
SE and SW directions are perpendicular (90В° apart).
After 5h: distances=5v and 5(v+7). By Pythagoras: (5v)ВІ+(5(v+7))ВІ=65ВІ.
25[vВІ+(v+7)ВІ]=4225 вҶ’ vВІ+(v+7)ВІ=169 вҶ’ 2vВІ+14v+49=169 вҶ’ 2vВІ+14vвҲ’120=0.
vВІ+7vвҲ’60=0 вҶ’ v=(вҲ’7+вҲҡ289)/2=5km/h. Other speed=12km/h. Sum=17.
Answer: 17.

9.solution:
At 45km mark: 7L remaining. Need 555km=37L, have 7L вҶ’ need 30L in 2 stops.
Last stop must be S (315km ahead): remaining 240km=16LвүӨ20L capacity вң“.
R (250km ahead): 305/15вүҲ20.3L>20L вң—. So last stop=S.
First stop: reach Q (100km) with 7вҲ’100/15=1/3L. Fill 14L вҶ’ 43/3L. Travel QвҶ’S(215km)=43/3L вҶ’ arrive S with 0L.
Fill 16L at S вҶ’ exactly enough for 240km. Tank never overflows. Option B (15L+20L) would need 21L at S, exceeds 20L capacity.
Answer: C.

10.solution:
Akash:Manu=1000:950 (Akash gives 50m start). Akash:Rohit=1000:931 (Akash gives 69m start).
Manu:Rohit=950:931. In 1000m race: when Manu finishes, Rohit covers (931/950)Г—1000=980m.
Manu beats Rohit by 20m вҶ’ can give 20m start. 20 not in options.
Answer: D (None of these).
